feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to preview the Fiori application in sap bas throwing Self signed certificate error.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create a application using smart filterbar and smart table where i am trying to map the odataservice.

When i try to preview / check locally from the BAS the metadata is not getting loaded and throwing 500 Internal server error. When i checked the logs its throwing the below error.

Please help me on this...

entry.title: Dynamic Column Headers for Parent and Child Rows in sap.ui.table.TreeTable
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am working with sap.ui.table.TreeTable in SAP UI5 and need to display hierarchical data where parent rows and child rows have different column headers.

Does SAP UI5 officially support different column headers for parent and child nodes in TreeTable?
If not, is there an alternative approach within SAP’s recommended best practices?


Thank you!

Regards,

Preeti

entry.title: FIORI Elements: Missing UI Message from Backend
entry.content:
Hi, 

i have created FIORI Elements App with BOPF as Backend. 

I implemented custom Actions, but triggered Error Messages from Backend are not displayed in FIORI but are visible in Network Console.

Backend Implementation:

 

  METHOD /bobf/if_frw_action~execute.

    DATA: usr_scenario_table TYPE Zt_pmc_usr_scen_ass.
    io_read->retrieve(
      EXPORTING
        iv_node                 = is_ctx-node_key
        it_key                  = it_key
      IMPORTING
        et_data                 = usr_scenario_table
    ).
    DATA(line) = usr_scenario_table[ 1 ].

    DATA: ls_message TYPE symsg.

    MESSAGE e000(ZPM_MO_US_MG) INTO DATA(lv_msg).
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING sy TO ls_message.

    ls_message-msgv1 = 'Errror in App'.

    IF eo_message IS NOT BOUND.
      eo_message = /bobf/cl_frw_factory=>get_message( ).
    ENDIF.

    eo_message->add_message(
      EXPORTING
        is_msg       = ls_message
        iv_node      = is_ctx-node_key
        iv_key       = it_key[ 1 ]-key
    ).

    APPEND VALUE #( key = it_key[ 1 ]-key ) TO et_failed_key.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

According to this UI5 Documentation there are two possible solutions for that:

  • Make Message Persistent
  • Defer read Operation after POST 

Topic 1: I have no idea how to make this message persistent, there is no parameter in the Message Object for that

Topic 2: I have set Attribute refreshAfterChange already to false in manifest.json file in BAS, Errors are still not displayed

 

Another User did have a similar Problem described here and solved it by addressing Importing Parameter "iv_message_target" to '/#TRANSIENT#'. But he did use another Message Container and probably had ODATA Service and not BOPF so its's not applicable for me.

Anyone got a hint?

EDIT:

After a bit of trial and error I tried deleting the selected line, Result was that i was successful and the List Report was automatically refreshed, so the above named attribute in manifest.json seems not to take effect in my Model.

SAP Fiori for SAP ERP

entry.title: BTP application writing to on-premise HANA database table / Datasphere HANA database table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some BTP developers creating an app that would write to an on-premise HANA database table (this database is used in for BW/4HANA).

We eventually want to migrate the BTP app to write to a Datasphere table. 

Is there a connection framework where we can easily switch the BTP app from writing to the on-premise HANA database table to writing to the Datasphere table?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: SAP BAS CAPM debugging Uncaught Error Error: ENOSPC: System limit for number of file watchers reache
entry.content:
Hi All,

When I am trying to debug the CAPM application in BAS I am facing below issue
Uncaught Error Error: ENOSPC: System limit for number of file watchers reached, watch '/home/user/projects/pcoe-1/db.sqlite-shm'

Can anyone help me to resolve this issue?

Thank you.

SAP Business Application Studio  SAP Cloud Application Programming Model

entry.title: Extend My Inbox Fiori Application for Purchase Order on SAP BTP BAS
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm extending my inbox PO approval app, the requirement is to add custom fields in master page in SAP BTP BAS.

 

Below are the fields

1.Supplier ID

2.Purchase Order

3.Landed cost

4.Vendor name

Can anyone please guide me on how this can be achieved, as this is new to me,

Thanks & Regards,

Atharva

entry.title: Issue when deploying simple app to BTP using 'cf push'
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

I’m new to BTP apps, and honestly, I’m about to lose it—so I really hope someone can help!

I’m using BAS (Business Application Studio) in case that’s relevant. My goal is simple: deploy a basic Fiori app with a blank page that displays a list of data from a web service. Everything works fine when running it in BAS for testing.

I’ve explored BTP in the past, but due to the complexity around deployments, manifests, YAML files, routes, and MTA, I put it on hold until things hopefully became more stable. Now, I’m trying again and facing deployment issues.

The Problem:

I attempted to deploy the app using cf push. I also tried using MTA, but for some reason, the HTML5 app is not being deployed. The ultimate goal is to add this app to S/4HANA Cloud Public via Launchpad.

When checking the logs with:

 

cf logs <prj_name> --recent

 

I see the following errors (in red):

 

   2025-02-13T06:10:09.11+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR sh: 1: tsc: not found
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice New major version of npm available! 10.7.0 -> 11.1.0
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice Changelog: https://github.com/npm/cli/releases/tag/v11.1.0
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice To update run: npm install -g npm@11.1.0
   2025-02-13T06:10:09.12+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR npm notice

 

It seems there are two major issues here:

1. TSC (TypeScript Compiler) not found

2. NPM version inconsistency

 

What I’ve Tried (Without Success)

1️⃣Fixing the tsc: not found Issue

Modified package.json to move TypeScript from devDependencies to dependencies:

 

Modify package.json
"dependencies": {
  "typescript": "^5.2.2"  // Añádelo aquí
},
"devDependencies": {
  
}

 

Installed TypeScript globally:

 

npm install typescript

 

Added a post-install script in package.json:

 

"scripts": {
"postinstall": "npm install -g typescript"
}

 

Verified TypeScript installation: 

 

npx tsc --version #returns 5.7.3

 

Despite all of this, cf push still throws the tsc: not found error.

 

2️⃣Fixing the NPM Version Issue

Updated NPM with:

 

npm install -g npm@11.1.0

 

However, running npm -v still shows the old version.

To fix this, I tried:

 

export PATH=$(npm prefix -g)/bin:$PATH

 

After this, npm -v shows the correct version (11.1.0).

But the errors still persist exactly the same after redeployment.

 

3️⃣ Other Things I’ve Tried (Also Failed)

✅Specified the Node.js version in package.json:

 

"engines": {
    "node": "20.x"
  }​

 

✅Created a manifest.yml to reduce memory size (not directly related but worth trying).

✅Deleted the failed app to free up space in BTP.

✅Completely removed and reinstalled node_modules:

 

rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json
npm cache clean --force
npm install

 

Yet, nothing has worked.

I’ve already gone through these articles, but they didn’t solve my issue:

• 🔗 Tips for Running CAP Node.js in SAP BTP

• 🔗 Error While Deploying CAP Project to CF Trial

My Questions

1. How can I ensure Cloud Foundry uses the correct Node.js and NPM versions during deployment?

2. Why does cf push fail with tsc: not found even though TypeScript is installed globally?

3. What’s the proper way to deploy a simple Fiori app (HTML5) to BTP and register it in S/4HANA Cloud Public via Launchpad?

I’d really appreciate any guidance—thanks in advance! 🚀

entry.title: Unable to access business application studio
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a BTP trial account and was trying to access SAP Business Application Studio, but it always shows a message saying "It's taking longer than expected to prepare your dev space".

entry.title: SAP Fiori RAP display [object Object]
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I am facing an issue when displaying the RAP application, as shown below:

But when I refresh the browser, it works normally.

When I preview the application in SAP BAS, it works fine, but when I preview it in the Eclipse tool, [object Object] is displayed.

How can I fix this issue?

Thanks!

entry.title: How to hide delete option from BAS dev space?
entry.content:
I have sap business application studio service where created a Dev Space. There is a delete option, however I would like to remove 'delete' option from there.

entry.title: Error retrieving edmx for [destination] - Fiori Project in Eclipse to BAS
entry.content:

I am trying the 'Create Fiori Project' functionality from the Service Binding (ABAP Cloud) in Eclipse. But when the Business Application Studio opens, I get the error:

"Error retrieving edmx for [s4h]. Unable to launch the Fiori generator from ADT. Check output logs [SAP Fiori Tools - Application Modeler] for more information."

What am I missing? My settings are as following.

Service Binding:

Eclipse external IDE configuration:

SAP Destination:

Error BAS:

SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: Issue with local annotations in sap bas
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create local annotations in the SAP BAS using open guided development in the project. When i try to table column(UI Line item) , the entity set is greyedout like below 

 

Also getting the warning message "The guide is not compatable with the current project and will not work as intened". Please help me on this.

entry.title: Local annotations are reflecting in sap smart controls
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create the fiori local annotations in my custom fiori app. I have created the annotation file under annotation folder and added UI.LineItem but its not reflecting. 

Below is the code in manifest.json file 

 

and below is the annotation code 

 

Even in the network tab the annotations file is getting loaded without any issue.

And when preview the application i dont see any columns in the smart table.

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Connecting Shopify to CAPM Issue
entry.content:
Hello All,


I’m currently working on a CAPM (Cloud Application Programming Model) project, where I’m trying to integrate Shopify using its API endpoints. The goal is to retrieve data by passing query parameters while using authentication credentials such as:

  • X-Shopify-Access-Token
  • Content-Type: application/json

Everything seems straightforward, but when I attempt to make a request, I keep running into this error:
read tcp 100.96.8.158:41620->23.227.38.74:443: read: connection reset by peer\

  • Checked API Credentials – The X-Shopify-Access-Token is valid, and the headers are correctly set.
  • Verified API Endpoint – The Shopify API URL and query parameters seem correct.
  • Tested with Postman – Surprisingly, the request works fine in Postman, but fails within CAPM.
  • Network & Firewall Debugging –
    • No restrictions from my end.
    • The Shopify endpoint is reachable via browser and Postman.
    • No VPN or proxy causing issues.
  • Tried Different HTTP Libraries –
    • Used both axios and node-fetch, but got the same error.
    • The issue persists in both @SAP-cloud-sdk/http-client and direct http.request().
  • Looked at Shopify Rate Limits –
    • Shopify enforces rate limits, but I’m well under the threshold.
    • Even after waiting, the request fails again.

      Here I'm sharing the screenshots of it and code which I'm using Can anyone help on this?

Sample Code:



Issue:

Thanks,
Manoj Kumar.

entry.title: Value help search in Smart Filterbar
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have requirement to add valuehelpsearch in the smart filterbar. I have already created custom fiori app which has smartfilterbar and smarttable which are refering some "abcentitySet" like below 

When i click on CompCode filter its not showing the search option , requirement is to search by Id and Name and get the results. So user can select 

Now my requirement is when user clicks on Compcode filter it should call diff  "xyzentityset" and display user to select. Below is the expected result

 

Can someone please throw some light on this and how can i achieve it ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Unable to access "SAP Business Application Studio" after using it few days, throwing "Access Denied"
entry.content:
Unable to access "SAP Business Application Studio" after using it few days, throwing "Access Denied" suddenly.

I have necessary roles of BAS Administration as well as BAS developer roles to my account i logged in. I am using BTP trail account. Something got changed while trying to follow the golden path [removed by moderator].

entry.title: Error: Fiori tool guided development with OData service v2
entry.content:
Hello,

I recentely found the sap fiori tools: guided deveopment does not work with Odata service V2 in VS Code and BAS. Do you have any solution for that? 

(It works well with the odata V4 )

Version:

Sap fiori tools: 1.16.4

VS code: 1.97.2

nodeJs:20.18.1

Thanks in advance,

SAP Fiori tools SAP Business Application Studio #visual studio code

@sinead_roche  thanks for your comment, here you are the error and the metadata file regarding the odata service V2

PS: it does not bug for the service odata created within SEGW, the one which does not work is created using RAP.

entry.title: In BAS, ui5-deploy.yaml files in all applications have an "Unable to load schema ..." error.
entry.content:
Out of the blue last week, in all applications that I load into BAS, the ui5-deploy.yaml is registering the following error: 

Unable to load schema from 'https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/schema/ui5.yaml.json': Request vscode/content failed unexpectedly without providing any details. YAML(768)

I haven't made any changes myself that would cause this for every application, but I do believe the error showed up after an SAP update to BAS. So far, research that I've done hasn't turned up any answers. Anybody have any ideas?

entry.title: smarttable sorting is not working
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have smart table where on load some data is getting populated , now i want to sort the data of the smart table without calling the backend. 

Is there any setting or property where smart table automatically does the sorting and filtering ? 

KR,
